TechStart Inc. seeking patent protection for novel AI-driven drug discovery platform.
Technology uses transformer models to predict protein-ligand binding affinities.
Need to file provisional patent application within 30 days to preserve rights.
Prior art search needed across USPTO, EPO, and WIPO databases.
Platform has 3 inventors across 2 universities — ownership agreement needed.
Potential licensing revenue: $10M-$50M annually.
